# Darbepoetin Alfa 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Darbepoetin Alfa 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Darbepoetin Alfa</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Darbepoetin Alfa 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of symptomatic anaemia associated with chronic renal failure (CRF) in adults and paediatric patients. Treatment of symptomatic anaemia in adult cancer patients with non-myeloid malignancies...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（96.7%）</li>
<li>renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system-blocker-induced angioedema（96.5%）</li>
<li>anaphylaxis（93.2%）</li>
<li class="indication-matched">psoriasis（92.7%）<span class="indication-tag">📰 psoriasis</span></li>
<li>penile fibromatosis（92.2%）</li>
<li>food-dependent exercise-induced anaphylaxis（92.0%）</li>
<li>Peyronie disease（91.9%）</li>
<li>Ledderhose disease（91.1%）</li>
<li>infantile digital fibromatosis（91.1%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（90.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/darbepoetin-alfa/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
